positive: A highly stylized, complex geometric mandala illustration centered on the composition. The central subject is an intertwined celestial flora – glowing vines, stylized crescent moons, and abstract botanical elements (like ferns and palm fronds) seamlessly woven together. The design must have a clean, thick-line vector art aesthetic, maximizing contrast between the elements and the background. Color palette is limited to deep indigo, vibrant teal, electric sapphire blue, and metallic gold accents. Emphasize strong, crisp silhouettes and symmetry. The composition must be perfectly balanced and scalable for apparel printing. Minimalist negative space treatment, high-impact visibility, tattoo flash style, ornate zentangle pattern, vector illustration, volumetric lighting.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, low detail, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, blurry edges, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, photorealism, solid color background, gradients (unless specified)
